title: Invicto
author: Martín Alonso
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A shield. A red diagonal slash across the shield. The title sits in the shield. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1000)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <path d="M -200 -200 Q -200 -260 -140 -260 L 140 -260 Q 200 -260 200 -200 L 200 0 Q 200 200 0 320 Q -200 200 -200 0 Z"/>
    <path d="M -170 -180 Q -170 -230 -120 -230 L 120 -230 Q 170 -230 170 -180 L 170 -10 Q 170 170 0 270 Q -170 170 -170 -10 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="-200" y1="0" x2="200" y2="-200" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="6"/>
    <text x="0" y="-60" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">UNBROKEN</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A heater shield with a single red diagonal slash — the wound that didn't break it. The title 'INVICTO' sits in massive 560px weight 500 type centered, a Spanish-language wall of confidence.
